new_classes.definition_en: Grape must classified under CN subheading 2204 30 96 that has been concentrated (e.g. by evaporation or other means) and falls within the scope of Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22, distinguishing it from the concentrated grape must of subheading 2204 30 92.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22043096 states only "Concentrated – See additional note 7 to this chapter." Two distinguishing criteria are present: (1) the grape must is concentrated (captured by the someValuesFrom restriction on ConcentratedQuality, which is already in the TBox); (2) the subheading falls within the scope of Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22, which sets out specific thresholds (e.g. Brix values or dry-matter content) differentiating this code from sibling 2204 30 92. Because Additional Note 7 itself is not reproduced in the provided legal notes and no TBox individual for that note is available, the exact quantitative criteria from the note cannot be expressed as OWL restrictions. The disjointness with ConcentratedGrapeMust22043092 is partially captured via a complement restriction, but without the numeric thresholds from Additional Note 7 the discrimination between 22043092 and 22043096 is incomplete. Coverage is therefore set to 0.55.
